_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Increased potency was observed with analogues, APX2009 and APX2014 in the panel of MPNST cell lines compared to APX3330 (3–7-fold decrease in IC50
details: Increased potency observed with 3-7-fold decrease in IC50 compared to APX3330 in panel of MPNST cell lines
